varieties.name: Bouquet
varieties.origin: Traditional heirloom variety, Europe, pre-1900s
varieties.traits: Height 90-120cm (3-4 feet), dark blue-green feathery foliage, large yellow flower umbels, quick to flower (85-100 days)
varieties.yield_notes: Excellent seed producer, abundant fragrant leaves
varieties.availability: Widely available from Australian seed suppliers including The Seed Collection, Bunnings, ABSeeds humid subtropical climates

varieties.name: Compatto
varieties.origin: Modern compact variety, developed for container growing
varieties.traits: Compact height 30-45cm (12-18 inches), blue-green aromatic foliage, hardy, slow to bolt, high essential oil content in seeds
varieties.yield_notes: Good leaf and seed production for compact size

varieties.name: Delikat
varieties.origin: Modern variety bred for dense foliage production
varieties.traits: Height 30-60cm (12-24 inches), extremely dense thick foliage, slightly spicy flavor, fast growing, disease resistant
varieties.yield_notes: Very high leaf yield, heavy seed production
varieties.availability: Australian herb seed suppliers, online retailers

varieties.name: Dukat (Tetra)
varieties.origin: Denmark, developed for intense flavor and slow bolting
varieties.traits: Height 30-60cm (12-24 inches), bright green foliage, high essential oil content, aromatic, disease resistant, slow to bolt
varieties.yield_notes: High leaf yield, reliable seed production, commercial grade
varieties.availability: The Seed Collection, Eden Brothers (ships to Australia), specialty suppliers

varieties.name: Elephant
varieties.origin: Modern variety, developed for extended leaf harvest
varieties.traits: Large variety 90-120cm (3-4 feet), dark green leaves, sweet mild flavor but strong aroma, late flowering, hardy
varieties.yield_notes: Good leaf production over extended period
varieties.availability: Burpee (international shipping), Australian online seed retailers

varieties.name: Fernleaf (Dwarfgurke)
varieties.origin: Modern dwarf variety, All-America Selections winner 1992
varieties.traits: Compact dwarf 30-45cm (12-18 inches), bushy fern-like foliage, slow to bolt, retains flavor after cutting longer than other varieties
varieties.yield_notes: Good for size, continuous production when harvested regularly
varieties.availability: Widely available - The Seed Collection, Bunnings, True Leaf Market (ships internationally)

varieties.name: Greensleeves (Green Sleeves)
varieties.origin: Modern slow-bolt variety
varieties.traits: Compact height 45-75cm (18-30 inches), dark green abundant foliage, sweet mild flavor, slow bolting, long harvest window
varieties.availability: Specialty herb suppliers, online seed companies

varieties.name: Hera
varieties.origin: Modern variety developed for strong flavor and slow bolting
varieties.traits: Compact 30-60cm (12-24 inches), fine blue-green foliage, bunching variety with uniform growth, strong flavor, slow to bolt in heat
varieties.yield_notes: Fuller production, reliable harvests over long period
varieties.availability: Specialty seed suppliers, online herb retailers

varieties.name: Hercules (Herkules)
varieties.origin: Modern variety bred for delayed flowering
varieties.traits: Tall 90-105cm (35-42 inches), long arching leaves, massive flower heads, tetraploid variety, slow to flower
varieties.yield_notes: High foliage production, bred specifically for leaf harvest
varieties.availability: Specialty suppliers, international seed companies

varieties.name: Kronos
varieties.origin: Netherlands, mid-season variety
varieties.traits: Medium height 60-90cm (24-36 inches), dark green waxy leaves, thick stems, large flowers
varieties.yield_notes: Good balanced leaf and seed production
varieties.availability: Specialty European seed suppliers

varieties.name: Long Island Mammoth
varieties.origin: Long Island, New York, USA - traditional heirloom variety, pre-1900s, developed for commercial production
varieties.traits: Very tall 90-150cm (3-5 feet), blue-green foliage, large seed heads on multiple stalks, strong scent and flavor, pungent
varieties.yield_notes: High seed production, moderate leaf yield, readily self-seeds
varieties.availability: Widely available - most Australian seed suppliers, The Seed Collection, Bunnings

varieties.name: Mammoth
varieties.origin: Traditional heirloom type, similar to Long Island Mammoth
varieties.traits: Very tall up to 150cm (5 feet), excellent flavor, traditional variety
varieties.yield_notes: High in hot climates according to sources, good seed production

varieties.name: Superdukat
varieties.origin: Hybrid variety introduced 1997, improved Dukat with more essential oils
varieties.traits: Tall 120-150cm (4-5 feet), grows uniformly straight, very high essential oil content, intense aromatic flavor, slow to bolt and decline, bushy foliage
varieties.yield_notes: Excellent seed production, reliable high yields, commercial grade
varieties.availability: Specialty seed suppliers, international retailers

varieties.name: Teddy
varieties.origin: Modern dwarf variety developed for containers
varieties.traits: Compact dwarf 30-45cm (12-18 inches), thicker leaves than typical dill, dense foliage, fast growing, upright form, slow to bolt
varieties.yield_notes: Good production for compact size, continuous if harvested regularly
varieties.availability: Specialty herb suppliers, online seed retailers

varieties.name: Vierling
varieties.origin: Traditional heirloom variety, Europe
varieties.traits: Height 90-150cm (3-5 feet), dark blue-green leaves, thick strong stems, slow to bolt, seed heads popular with florists, aromatic
varieties.yield_notes: Dense widespread foliage, good for continuous leaf harvesting
varieties.availability: Specialty heirloom seed suppliers, online retailers (Amazon)

varieties.name: Indian Dill (Anethum sowa) 🏆🌏 INDIGENOUS
varieties.origin: Native to Northern India, traditional variety cultivated for centuries, grown extensively throughout Indian subcontinent, Malaysia, and Japan
varieties.traits: Height 60-100cm (2-3.3 feet), bolder seeds than European dill, longer and narrower seeds with paler ridges, pungent and somewhat more bitter than European varieties, lower carvone content, different flavor profile
varieties.yield_notes: Good seed and leaf production, adapted to Indian growing conditions
varieties.availability: tropical monsoon climates agricultural stores, Indian seed companies (Jyothy Laboratories, JDG Seed Company Neemuch), local nurseries in tropical monsoon climates region, traditional suppliers

varieties.name: Ajmer Dill 1 (NRCSS-AD-1)
varieties.origin: National Research Centre on Seed Spices, Ajmer, India - improved Indian variety recommended for general cultivation
varieties.traits: European-type dill adapted for Indian conditions, average height 134cm, dillapiole-free seeds, 3.5% essential oil content, uniform growth
varieties.yield_notes: 142 days to maturity, 14.7 quintals/hectare seed yield under irrigated conditions
varieties.availability: National Research Centre on Seed Spices (NRCSS), Indian agricultural universities, government seed programs

varieties.name: Ajmer Dill 2 (NRCSS-AD-2)
varieties.origin: National Research Centre on Seed Spices, Ajmer, India - improved Indian variety
varieties.traits: Indian-type dill with bold, compact, dark seeds - characteristic Indian dill traits
varieties.yield_notes: Bred for improved yields over local varieties

varieties.name: Bouquet (for Kerala)
varieties.origin: European heirloom
varieties.availability: International seed suppliers, some Indian retailers

varieties.name: Compatto (for Kerala)
varieties.origin: Modern compact variety
varieties.availability: International seed companies, specialty suppliers

varieties.name: Elephant (for Kerala)
varieties.origin: Modern late-flowering variety
varieties.availability: Burpee (international), specialty seed suppliers

varieties.name: Fernleaf (for Kerala)
varieties.origin: Modern dwarf variety
varieties.availability: Widely available internationally, True Leaf Market ships globally

varieties.name: Hera (for Kerala)
varieties.origin: Modern slow-bolt variety
varieties.availability: Specialty seed suppliers, international retailers

varieties.name: Mammoth (for Kerala)
varieties.origin: Traditional heirloom

varieties.name: Vierling (for Kerala)
varieties.origin: European heirloom
varieties.availability: Specialty heirloom suppliers, international retailers
